seoTitle: Kembla Grange vs Kembla Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kembla Grange and Kembla Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kembla Grange vs Kembla Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kembla Grange and Kembla Heights.
heading: Kembla Grange vs Kembla Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kembla Grange, New South Wales and Kembla Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kembla Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kembla Grange (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kembla Grange or Kembla Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kembla Grange has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Kembla Heights scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kembla Grange scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Kembla Heights scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kembla Grange or Kembla Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kembla Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
